holdings.infoBox: FBY is an equity ETF with a total of 16 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax META Option Income Strategy ETF (FBY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in communication services equity. The fund seeks to provide current income and capped gains on the Meta Platforms stock (META) through a synthetic covered call strategy, collateralized by cash and US Treasurys. The actively managed fund uses both standardized exchange-traded and FLEX options FBY was launched on Jul 27, 2023 and is issued by YieldMax.
